data.name: Hentai World Relax
data.detailed_description:
Challenge your mind with this Caro game .Every victory unlocks a stunning image of a beautiful girl.Outsmart your opponent and enjoy sweet rewards for your sharp thinking!

Each win unlocks a high-quality image of a beautiful girl, specially designed to reward your achievements. The more you win, the more stunning visuals you unlock!

Features:

Unlock Beautiful Rewards – Win matches to reveal stunning and diverse images of beautiful girls.

Soothing Soundtrack – Enjoy a relaxing background music experience that keeps your mind calm and focused as you play.

Full-Screen Image Viewer – After each victory, view your unlocked artwork in full resolution and admire every detail.

No Time Limits – Play at your own pace with zero pressure.

Strategic Gameplay – Classic Caro rules make every match both fun and mentally rewarding.

data.short_description: Test your strategy in this exciting Caro game! Each victory unlocks a beautiful, high-quality image of a charming girl—your reward for outsmarting your opponent. The more you win, the more stunning images you collect. Play smart, win big, and enjoy the visual rewards!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
